command.hint-reset: Reset the Prospector's Pan corner hint position.
gmcm.enable-spot-tuning.name: Improve Panning Spots
gmcm.enable-spot-tuning.tooltip: Allows Prospector's Pan to make panning spots easier to find and less likely to vanish immediately.
gmcm.spot-spawn-multiplier.name: Vanilla Spot Attempts
gmcm.spot-spawn-multiplier.tooltip: Extra vanilla panning spot attempts when no spot exists. 100% is vanilla frequency.
gmcm.spot-lifetime-multiplier.name: Spot Lifetime
gmcm.spot-lifetime-multiplier.tooltip: How long fresh panning spots are protected from disappearing. 100% is close to vanilla.
gmcm.reachable-assist.name: Reachable Spot Assist
gmcm.reachable-assist.tooltip: When holding the Copper Pan near water, occasionally creates a reachable panning spot.
gmcm.reachable-chance.name: Reachable Assist Chance
gmcm.reachable-chance.tooltip: Chance for the reachable spot assist to create a spot when eligible.
gmcm.assisted-cooldown.name: Assist Cooldown Minutes
gmcm.assisted-cooldown.tooltip: Minimum in-game minutes between assisted spots in the same location.
gmcm.bonus-rewards.name: Bonus Rewards
gmcm.bonus-rewards.tooltip: Adds original bonus rewards on top of vanilla panning rewards.
gmcm.reward-generosity.name: Reward Generosity
gmcm.reward-generosity.tooltip: Vanilla disables bonus rewards. Standard is balanced. Generous is intentionally richer.
gmcm.progression-rewards.name: Progression Rewards
gmcm.progression-rewards.tooltip: Allows better bonus reward pools after mining and world progression.
gmcm.island-rewards.name: Ginger Island Rewards
gmcm.island-rewards.tooltip: Allows island-flavored bonus rewards after Ginger Island access.
gmcm.pan-hint.name: Show Pan Hint
gmcm.pan-hint.tooltip: Shows a small direction hint while holding the Copper Pan near a panning spot.
gmcm.pan-hint-position.name: Hint Position
gmcm.pan-hint-position.tooltip: Corner shows a compact HUD hint. World shows only a tiny marker near the spot. Hold Left Shift and drag the corner hint to move it.
gmcm.pan-hint-mode.name: Hint Detail
gmcm.pan-hint-mode.tooltip: Choose whether the pan hint shows direction only or direction plus distance.
